name: helm-values-explorer
description: Hover over .Values in Helm templates to see resolved values across environments. Orphan detection for unused keys and unresolved refs.

helmValues.helmfilePath.description: Path to helmfile.yaml relative to workspace root

helmValues.secretsFilePath.description: Override path to secrets file (e.g. when git-ignored)

helmValues.excludeOrphanPrefixes.description: Value path prefixes to exclude from orphan diagnostics (e.g. global.images)
